description_pairs.source_description: Wrapper on meta data of page. @param needHelmetWrapper - component needs helmet wrapper. @param metaComponent - meta data component. @returns jsx
description_pairs.data_description: Wrapper on meta data of page @param needHelmetWrapper - component needs helmet wrapper @param metaComponent - meta data component @returns jsx

description_pairs.source_description: Blog post info panel component. @param postId - post id. @param readingTime - post reading time. @param date - post create date. @param theme - theme name. @param qa - test-attr. @param analyticsEventsContainer - a map of records with a single or collection of objects detailing analytics events. @returns jsx
description_pairs.data_description: Blog post info panel component @param postId - post id @param readingTime - post reading time @param date - post create date @param theme - theme name @param qa - test-attr @param analyticsEventsContainer - a map of records with a single or collection of objects detailing analytics events @returns jsx

description_pairs.source_description: Popup that appears with text message and button(s) for given `actions`. Features: - Automatically disappears after `openDuration` in milliseconds. - `openTimestamp` (`Date.now()`) resets the visible duration. @returns {JSX|null}
description_pairs.data_description: Popup that appears with text message and button(s) for given `actions`. Features: - Automatically disappears after `openDuration` in milliseconds - `openTimestamp` (`Date.now()`) resets the visible duration @returns {JSX|null}

description_pairs.source_description: Authentication Popup that appears when user action requires login. @returns {JSX|null}
description_pairs.data_description: PromptSignIn displays a prompt encouraging unauthenticated users to sign in. It extends the uikit Prompt component with a dedicated sign-in action button. Used in blog contexts to gate interactions like comments or reactions behind authentication.
